## ResolvedCatalogEntry interface

A resolved catalog entry. Internal representation; consumers don't usually construct these directly — they pass `CatalogInput`<!-- -->s to `defineCatalog`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ResolvedCatalogEntry
```
